NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: HbA1c change from baseline at primary timepoint (26–40 weeks) — mean difference (MD, %)
NMA_CONFIG.note: Rich network: Tirz–Sema direct (SURPASS-2); Sema–Dula direct (SUSTAIN-7); Dula–Lira direct (AWARD-6); Lira–Exe direct (LEAD-6); Sema–Exe direct (SUSTAIN-3). One closed 4-node loop (Sema–Dula–Lira–Exe–Sema) enables consistency testing. Tirz/Sema anchored to Placebo via SURPASS-1 and SUSTAIN-1. Exenatide is a composite node (ER in SUSTAIN-3, BID in LEAD-6) — declared in transitivity.

title: RapidMeta Endocrinology | Incretin Class NMA in Type 2 Diabetes v1.4 (sensitivity strata + tirzepatide precision)
